purpose: Create one or more Journal Entry reports (AJE, TJE, PAJE, RJE). Lands in Unfiled Reports.

body_template_separate.engagementId: <clientId — misnamed field per platform-wide naming gotcha>

body_template_combined.engagementId: <clientId — misnamed field per platform-wide naming gotcha>

batch_support: implicit — SeparateReports[n] creates n workpapers; CombinedReports[m] creates m workpapers, each combining the jeTypes in its entry

enums.je_type_ids: see references/config/je_types.json — AJE=1, TJE=2, PAJE=3, RJE=4 (not alphabetical; captured positionally)

gotchas: Body field `engagementId` carries the clientId. `periodId` carries the engagementId.
Put type IDs in EXACTLY ONE of SeparateReports OR CombinedReports — never both populated for the same set of types.

SeparateReports is a flat array of type IDs: [1, 4, ...]. Creates one workpaper per ID, each named '{report_name}_{TYPE}' (e.g. report_name='AJEs' + [1,4] → 'AJEs_AJE' and 'AJEs_RJE'). reportIds issued sequentially in array order.
CombinedReports is an array of OBJECTS: [{postFix: str|null, jeTypes: [ids]}]. Each entry produces ONE workpaper containing the listed jeTypes. Multiple entries → multiple combined workpapers.
postFix is the optional name suffix override for a combined report. When null, CCH picks a default suffix.
JE type IDs are not alphabetical: AJE=1, TJE=2, PAJE=3, RJE=4.
Pre-flight quota: GET /v1/JournalEntryReport/{clientId}/cancreate returns {count, limit:100, canCreate}.
Path is just /v1/JournalEntryReport — no /createReports suffix like the TB endpoint has.
verification: GET /v1/JournalEntryReport/{clientId} — new reportGuid(s) should appear in the response array.
validated_on: APNM 2025, 2026-05-24 — SeparateReports [1,4,2,3] all four → AJE/RJE/TJE/PAJE separate workpapers
APNM 2025, 2026-05-24 — CombinedReports [{postFix: null, jeTypes: [1,4,2,3]}] → single combined workpaper
script_function: scripts.reports.create_je_report(client_id, engagement_id, report_name, headers, je_types=('AJE',), combined=False, combined_postfix=None, ...)
